problem: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal?
mechanism: Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor
hypothesis: Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor may resolve Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 30 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
